ai_provider.description: AI Provider ID for digest generation. Empty uses session default.
ai_provider.hint: Provider ID from AstrBot's provider list

default_interval.description: Default RSS fetch interval in minutes

max_error_count.description: Max consecutive errors before disabling a subscription

rsshub_url.hint: Custom RSSHub instance URL, e.g., https://rsshub.app

ai_digest_max_input_tokens.description: Maximum input tokens for AI digest
ai_digest_max_input_tokens.hint: Default 128K tokens, reduce for smaller models

ai_digest_max_output_tokens.description: Maximum output tokens for AI digest

ai_digest_title_max_len.description: Max characters for article title in digest

ai_digest_content_max_len.description: Max characters for article content in digest

ai_fallback_message.description: Message shown when AI digest fails (empty = show article list)

article_retention_days.description: Days to keep articles before cleanup
